Package com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractArrayWriter
    Positional state for forward-only array writers.
    AbstractNativeArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The base of all native arrays: one aligned allocation, cached base address, and lifecycle.
    AbstractNativeArray2D
    The fixed-shape scaffolding behind the row-major 2D grids: dimensions, flat addressing, and lifecycle.
    AbstractNativeCollection<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The base of all native collections: allocator, backing array, size, and lifecycle.
    AbstractNativeList<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The contiguous-storage engine behind lists, stacks, and heaps.
    AbstractNativeMap<T extends PStruct>
    The struct-entry hash engine behind the maps: open addressing over a keyed layout with a reserved zero-key slot.
    AbstractNativeRing<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The ring engine behind queues, deques, and buffers: wraparound head and tail over one array.
    AbstractPrimitiveArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    A native array of fixed-width elements with checked and unchecked access.
    AbstractPrimitiveDeque<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive deques.
    AbstractPrimitiveFixedQueue<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive fixed queues.
    AbstractPrimitiveHeap<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive heaps.
    AbstractPrimitiveList<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive lists.
    AbstractPrimitiveQueue<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive queues.
    AbstractPrimitiveRingBuffer<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive ring buffers.
    AbstractPrimitiveStack<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
    The marker base for primitive stacks.
    AbstractStructList<T extends PStruct>
    The contiguous-storage base for struct collections: layout, view factory, and array creation.
    AbstractStructRing<T extends PStruct>
    The ring-storage base for struct collections: layout, view factory, and array creation.
